spec_match.rationale: The page now compares auto with the constrained spaces/none alias path instead of claiming none is a separate no-overhang mode.

interactive.rationale: Chrome DevTools MCP moved density, rt length, base font, and column width controls, then clicked auto, spaces, and none.

blurb_alignment.rationale: The feature index now matches the page's line, height, and rendered rt/rb width metrics.

edge_cases.rationale: The stress metric now measures rendered rt and rb boxes with getBoundingClientRect rather than relying only on character counts.

references.rationale: The page now embeds the ChromeStatus feature link in its references.

design_system.rationale: The concept uses CSS variables and no raw hex literals were found in the feature concept HTML.

summary: Furigana Density Stress now reports an average rendered rt/rb width ratio, includes a spaces control, and links ChromeStatus. DevTools MCP verified the sliders, overhang controls, metrics, and console cleanliness.
